reviews.review_description: So the game is rlly good I loved it had the most fun I've had in awhile but then this guy named either yellowfish or yellowking came over I was having fun but then since I was server leader they were asking me to get to facility. I said "I don't want to maybe we should spawn something" but then they started reporting me because I didn't wanna go! Then this guy named Bob reported and yellowfish/king reported me and said quote on quote "I reported you for taking to long" also I did go to facility even though they were being rude to me then the yellowfish/king was like "are you to scared to go get disco" so then I was like okay yalls are being mean so I left the map and then yellow reported me even though HE WAS BEING RUDE I SAID HE WAS BEING A BAD SPORT AND HE STARTED ATTACKING ME then apparently he REPORTED ME TO THE DISCORD FOR TAKING TO LONG TO GO INTO A MAP please ban this guy he was honestly just being rude and a non fun player  -kittys.are.cuties p.s he was flaming my friend for apparently staying in a map me and my friend were just having fun but he ruined it so please ban this guy thank u

I was playing in the code 1 with other people and a few moderators and then a kid said the N-word and the server and the moderator said it was me and ￼kept harassing me asking and saying why’d I do it meanwhile the kid continued saying the N-word, I forgot the moderators name but he kept coming up to me and saying “Do you remember?”￼ as if I should get scared or something? But a few minutes after that he said he was looking at my ID for the game at this point i gave up but if I get ban im not gonna do it in silence. P.S￼ the owner is goated he’s very nice and a chill guy.
I'VE BEEN WAITING FOR SO LONG TO GET OF OF ITCH IO  IT'S A DREAM COME TRUE THIS GAME IS PEAK
